ddls:
CREATE TABLE "character_levels" (
  "class_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the character class */,
  "level" TEXT /* Character level (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "base_attack_bonus" INTEGER /* Base attack bonus for the character at this level */,
  "fort_save" INTEGER /* Fortitude saving throw value */,
  "ref_save" INTEGER /* Reflex saving throw value */,
  "will_save" INTEGER /* Will saving throw value */,
  "special_abilities" TEXT /* Special abilities granted at this level */,
  "powers_known" TEXT /* Powers known by the character at this level */,
  "hit_dice" INTEGER /* Number of hit dice gained at this level */,
  "skill_points" INTEGER /* Number of skill points gained at this level */,
  "feats" TEXT /* Feats that the character can choose at this level */,
  "class_features" TEXT /* Additional class-specific features granted at this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id", "level")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" TEXT /* Primary key for the character */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the player who created the character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Character's name */,
  "race" TEXT /* Character's race */,
  "class_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the character's class */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Current hit points of the character */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Character's alignment (e.g., lawful good, chaotic evil) */,
  "background" TEXT /* Character's background story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" TEXT /* Primary key for the class */,
  "name" TEXT /* Class name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the class */,
  "hit_die" TEXT /* Hit die for the class (e.g., d6, d8) */,
  "base_attack_bonus" TEXT /* Base attack bonus progression */,
  "fort_save" TEXT /* Fortitude saving throw progression */,
  "ref_save" TEXT /* Reflex saving throw progression */,
  "will_save" TEXT /* Will saving throw progression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "powers" (
  "power_id" TEXT /* Primary key for the power */,
  "name" TEXT /* Power name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power */,
  "class_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the class that grants the power */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the power is granted */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of power (e.g., spell, ability) */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Detailed effect of the power */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feats" (
  "feat_id" TEXT /* Primary key for the feat */,
  "name" TEXT /* Feat name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feat */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the feat */,
  "benefit" TEXT /* Benefit of the feat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_powers" (
  "character_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the character */,
  "power_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the power */,
  "level_acquired" INTEGER /* Level at which the character acquired the power */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_feats" (
  "character_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the character */,
  "feat_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the feat */,
  "level_acquired" INTEGER /* Level at which the character acquired the feat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "feat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Primary key for the player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Player's username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" TEXT /* Primary key for the guild */,
  "name" TEXT /* Guild name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Guild description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guild was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_guilds" (
  "character_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the character */,
  "guild_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the guild */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character joined the guild */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "guild_id")
)
column_names: Foreign key to the character class
Base attack bonus for the character at this level
Special abilities granted at this level
Powers known by the character at this level
Number of hit dice gained at this level
Number of skill points gained at this level
